title: Luki and Pollution (Official)
description: This mod adds a better ore than diamond that can only be found in the Pollution dimension.
body:
Also available on Curseforge: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/luki-and-pollution-official

This Forge mod supports the latest Minecraft versions and is no longer exclusive to 1.14.4.

What’s inside this mod:

- ✅ Luki Ore — a rare, powerful new ore stronger than diamond
- ✅ Pollution Dimension — gray-themed world full of dead blocks
- ⚠️ Additional mobs and features — coming soon 

Explore the Pollution Dimension to discover the elusive Luki ore amidst a hostile and desolate environment.

Summary:

Forge mod compatible with recent Minecraft versions (previously only 1.14.4)

Adds Luki Ore, a high-tier material stronger than diamond

Introduces the Pollution Dimension, a new dimension.

Ongoing development: new mobs, features, and surprises planned

License:

This mod is licensed under Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial. CurseForge uses CC BY-NC 3.0 Unported due to platform constraints, while Modrinth uses the updated CC BY-NC 4.0 version. Both allow sharing and modification with credit, but prohibit commercial use.
